title: [Transforms] Make CSE extensible and implement CSE that ignores namehints
body:
This commit modifies upstream CSE so that downstream users can use their own OperationInfo and OperationEquivalence, and implement `NamehintsInsensitiveCSE` which is a CSE pass that ignores namehints. Since the current upstream CSE is hard to customize, I duplicated the relevant code to lib/Transforms/CSE.cpp and will work on upstreaming patches afterward.

Changes that need to be upstreamed:

* CSE 
Currently CSE is not implemented as a library, so this commit separates CSE pass into `struct CSEImpl<OperationInfo>` where `OperationInfo` is `DenseMapInfo` used for hashing and equivalence checking in CSE. Otherwise, there is no functional difference to the original implementation.

* OperationEquivalence 
`OperationEquivalence::computeHash` and `OperationEquivalence::isEquivalentTo` are modified to take an additional callback to provide a way to customize CSE (in our use case, functions that ignore `sv.namehint` are passed).

As CSE.cpp is fairly big, here is diff against for llvm: https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/compare/main...uenoku:llvm-project:dev/hidetou/cse-extensible?expand=1
